title: Miracle of Love
original_title: มหัศจรรย์แห่งรัก
overview: The story of chaotic love story And involved with people of twelve people When the destruction brought them to meet in Chiang Mai And each person must find different love only he and she has to overcome the tests that will prove that they understand and know the words of love.
